dosingInfo.rawDosageText: 2 DOSAGE AND ADMINISTRATION Administration Instructions: Evaluate renal function before initiating therapy with balsalazide disodium capsules. ( 2.1 ) Swallow capsules whole. Do not cut, break, crush or chew. ( 2.1 ) For patients who cannot swallow intact capsules, the capsules may be opened and sprinkled on applesauce, then chewed and swallowed immediately. ( 2.1 ) Teeth and/or tongue staining may occur when administered sprinkled on applesauce. ( 2.1 ) Drink an adequate amount of fluids. ( 2.1
